title: seseli varium var. atlanticum
intro: Seseli varium var. atlanticum, also known as Atlantic Seseli or Mountain Parsley, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating, cramps, and flatulence, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Seseli varium var. atlanticum include its ability to reduce nausea, ease respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic. Seseli varium var. atlanticum is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or essential oil, and can be consumed as a tea, taken as a supplement, or applied topically for its therapeutic benefits.
